# Arjun Varadiyil — Portfolio

> Full Stack Developer at Faircode Infotech, Kerala, India. Builds Next.js platforms for healthcare, civic, education, and campaign clients.

## About

- Name: Arjun Varadiyil
- Role: Full Stack Developer @ Faircode Infotech
- Location: Kerala, India
- Website: https://arjunvaradiyil.in
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/arjunvaradiyil
- GitHub: https://github.com/arjunvaradiyil/arjun.varadiyil

## Expertise

- Full stack Next.js development — frontend, APIs, and databases
- Headless CMS architecture with Payload CMS
- Healthcare, civic, education, and campaign web platforms
- Performance, accessibility, and maintainable production delivery
